description: A kit containing grinders, presses, molds, and chemical reagents for converting butchered creature parts into taming treats.  This is a crafting tool; to use it, first butcher a creature to collect its meat or parts, then open the crafting menu (press & or search crafting) and look for treat recipes under Other or Electronics.  The toolkit must be in your inventory.  It is never consumed; you can reuse it forever.  Fresh meat makes meaty treats; plant matter makes veggie treats; electronic parts make tech treats; tainted flesh from zombies and nether creatures makes eldritch treats.  Zombies cannot be converted into meaty treats because of their tainted nature.
